heading: Backup authority to establish a nationwide mortgage licensing and registry system
label: 5108 Backup authority to establish a nationwide mortgage licensing and registry system
text: If at any time the Director determines that the Nationwide Mortgage Licensing System and Registry is failing to meet the requirements and purposes of this chapter for a comprehensive licensing, supervisory, and tracking system for loan originators, the Director shall establish and maintain such a system to carry out the purposes of this chapter and the effective registration and regulation of loan originators.
notes: Amendments2010— substituted “Director” for “Secretary” in two places.Pub. L. 111–203

Effective Date of 2010 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the designated transfer date, see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Pub. L. 111–203section 1100H of Pub. L. 111–203section 552a of Title 5
